title: erigeron melanocephalus
intro: Erigeron melanocephalus, also known as Black Sampson or Black Fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Erigeron melanocephalus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Erigeron melanocephalus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is also sometimes used in folk medicine to make a poultice for wound healing and skin conditions.
